title: rhapisma #4475
definition:
1) a blow with a rod or staff or a scourge
 2) a blow with the flat of the hand, a slap in the face, box the ear
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) a blow with a rod or staff or a scourge
 2) a blow with the flat of the hand, a slap in the face, box the ear

    NASB:  a blow (with a stick or the palm of the hand):
